global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on the service offered.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the entire canvas, creating a lively atmosphere.

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: The bold text 'SwiftStack' is prominently displayed at the top, featuring a strong, modern font.

elements.label: Service description
elements.description: The text 'Track every euro Built for peace of mind' is centered, using a clear and readable font.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape, possibly a rounded rectangle, is placed in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape, resembling an oval, is also centered, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is positioned at the top left, adding a subtle detail.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element is located at the bottom center, contributing to the design's balance.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom reads 'Book now' in bold text, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Service tagline
elements.description: The tagline 'Track every euro Built for peace of mind' is visually striking and centrally aligned.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button 'Book now' is prominently displayed at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.
